message:
fix: TUI layout visibility + install script artifact naming

TUI fixes (closes PR #46 ideas):
- Increase search bar layout height from 3 to 6 lines
- Increase input area from 2 to 4 lines for filter text visibility
- Add workspace_suggestions() with substring matching
- Load known workspaces from DB at startup
- Add workspace suggestions dropdown in Workspace filter mode
- Add Tab completion for workspace filter
- Adjust agent dropdown y-offset for new layout

Install script fixes (closes #16):
- Update artifact naming from coding-agent-search-{triple}.tar.xz
  to cass-{target}.tar.gz to match actual release artifacts
- Add Windows .zip support
- Add multi-format extraction (tar.gz, tar.xz, zip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
